title: Follow request management endpoints
description: Implement follow request endpoints for locked accounts. GET /api/v1/follow_requests returns pending inbound follow requests. POST /api/v1/follow_requests/:id/authorize accepts the request (creates followers row, sends Accept activity). POST /api/v1/follow_requests/:id/reject sends Reject activity and removes request.
design: Accept activity: {type:Accept, actor:local_actor_uri, object:{original_follow_activity_ap_id}}. Reject activity: {type:Reject, actor:..., object:{...}}. Remove from follow_requests after authorize/reject. Deliver Accept/Reject to requester's inbox.
acceptance_criteria: Inbound Follow to locked account creates follow_request row; GET /api/v1/follow_requests shows it; authorize creates followers row and sends Accept; reject sends Reject activity; authorizing non-existent request returns 404
